home.saveurs_texte: A bold reinvention of Mediterranean and Saharan classics. Every ingredient is selected with absolute rigour, paying tribute to Algeria's forgotten terroirs.
home.statement_texte: Let yourself be transported by a unique sensory experience at the heart of modern Algiers. Limited seats.
home.resa_texte: No deposit, no online payment. Payment on site only.

confirmation.sous_titre: We look forward to welcoming you for a gastronomic experience at the heart of Algerian heritage.
confirmation.preparer_texte: Our dress code reflects the elegance of our establishment: smart attire required. If you are more than 15 minutes late, please contact us.

histoire.label: Our story
histoire.intro_citation: At the heart of Algiers the White, we have built a sanctuary dedicated to the memory of flavours, where every dish tells a millennial journey.
histoire.intro_p1: Our adventure begins with a promise: to never let the fire of Algerian culinary traditions die out. From the Casbah to the southern oases, we have travelled the country to rediscover forgotten gestures and exceptional ingredients.
histoire.intro_p2: Here, gastronomy is not just a matter of taste — it is an architecture of the soul. We use durum wheat from our plains, olive oil from our mountains, and the spices that made our historic trading posts famous.
histoire.modernite_p1: Respecting the past does not mean being imprisoned by it. Our cuisine is a constant reinvention. By using cutting-edge techniques to elevate local produce, we create a bridge between yesterday and tomorrow.
histoire.modernite_p2: Each service is a theatrical performance, a tribute to the legendary hospitality of our land. We invite you to a table where time stands still, giving way to the poetry of the palate.
histoire.collectif_desc: Behind every gesture, an expert hand. Our team brings together passionate individuals, guardians of flavour, and visionaries.
histoire.cta_desc: The Algiers Gastronomy experience is above all lived around the table. Book your culinary journey today.

contact.label: Contact
contact.lieu_p1: Nestled in one of Algiers' most historic neighbourhoods, our establishment invites a rediscovery of the senses. The murmur of the Mediterranean is never far, blending with the aromas of our kitchens to create an atmosphere of absolute serenity.
contact.lieu_p2: Come and live an experience where time stands still, between inherited tradition and culinary modernity.
